title: Best B.Tech Gaming Technology Programs in Noida
content: The School of Computing Science and Engineering introduces this program to provide high quality undergraduate education to the students with objective of preparing students for prolific careers in gaming technology. This program encompasses leading game development framework for the gaming Industry. This course curriculum involves develop a game using new technology scripting language. For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 60% marks or equivalent 2) 60% PCM or above at XII level. 01 02 03 01 02 For Lateral Entry: Passed Diploma examination with at least 60% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology.
